Annual Wildlife Heatmaps by Location and Category

This page provides access to annual wildlife heatmap reports organised by country, year, location, and category. Each entry opens an individual heatmap chart together with a downloadable data file.

Available Reports

These reports summarise the annual distribution of records across locations and wildlife categories using personal field records.

Country Year Location Category
United-Kingdom 1996 Kennington Birds

These reports are generated from the author's own wildlife records and summarise long-term observations of species occurrences over time.
